reforms.description: The introduction of special tax allowances for research and development investment in industry aims to incentivize firms to invest in R&D activities.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging R&D investment can lead to innovation, increased productivity, and long-term economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Special tax allowances for research and development investment in industry have been introduced.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant effort to stimulate R&D investment in the private sector, which is crucial for fostering innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Special tax allowances for research and development investment in industry.
